Aircraft.name: 0_demo_plane

Setter.function: ((smooth(((0.2 * clamp01((Time > 0.5))) * clamp(PID(clamp(((PitchAngle + AOA) - clamp01((0.2 - rate(Altitude)))), -1, 1), PitchRate, 2, 0, 0.2), -1, 1)), ((((0.03 * inverselerp(40, 15, abs(PitchAngle))) * inverselerp(35, 15, abs(RollAngle))) * inverselerp(20, 10, (abs(PitchRate) + abs(RollRate)))) * inverselerp(0.3, 0.1, (abs(Pitch) + abs(Roll))))) * (((inverselerp(1, 0, abs(Pitch)) * inverselerp(20, 50, IAS)) * inverselerp(90, 60, abs(RollAngle))) * clamp01((1 - (2 * abs(Trim)))))) + (0.3 * Trim))

(((IAS > 5) & (abs(AngleOfSlip) > 45)) ? 0 : ((clamp((((((30 + (40 * clamp01(-Activate8))) - (10 * clamp01((abs(smooth(Roll, 2)) * 2)))) * smooth(clamp(Pitch, -1, 0), 1)) - AOA) * 0.02), 0, 0.5) * inverselerp(30, 80, IAS)) - (AOA / 45)))
((IAS > 12) ? ((smooth(Pitch, (0.5 + (1.5 * inverselerp(300, 50, IAS)))) * control_limiter) * Glimiter) : ((canopy_opened = false) ? smooth(Pitch, 4) : (Pitch * 2)))

(((((pitch_control * ((pitch_control < 0) ? 0.5 : (0.1 + (0.9 * inverselerp(80, 30, IAS))))) * inverselerp((30 + (40 * clamp01(-Activate8))), 10, abs(AOA))) + AOA_feed) + (((-rate(AOA) * 0.007) * inverselerp(200, 100, IAS)) * clamp01(Activate8))) + autotrim)

{round(IAS*3.6/10)*10;000}
G {round(VerticalG*5)/5;0.0}
M {mach_number;0.00}
α {round(abs(AOA)/2)*2;00}
{SelectedWeapon=""&-TargetSelected?"NAV":""}{SelectedWeapon = "Interceptor" ? "INT":""}{SelectedWeapon = "Guardian" ? "GUA":""}{SelectedWeapon = "Inferno" ? "INF":""}{SelectedWeapon = "Cleaver" ? "CLE":""}
{round(repeat((Heading),360)/5)*5;000}

GEAR
{smooth(clamp01(GearDown), 0.25) = 0 ? "UP" : (smooth(clamp01(GearDown),0.15) = 1 ? "DOWN" : "MOVING")}
TRIM
{clamp(autotrim+Trim,-1,1)*100;0}%
HOOK
{Activate3?"DOWN":"UP"}
G
{round(abs(VerticalG)*5)/5;0.0}
M
{mach_number;0.00}
α
{GS>5?round(abs(AngleOfAttack)/2)*2:0;00}

{Ledl=1?"":""}
{SelectedWeapon = "Interceptor" ? "■" : ""}INT{ammo("Interceptor");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Guardian" ? "■" : ""}GUA{ammo("Guardian");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Inferno" ? "■" : ""}INF{ammo("Inferno");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Cleaver" ? "■" : ""}CLE{ammo("Cleaver");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Rocket Pod" | SelectedWeapon = "Rocket"? "■" : ""}ROC{ammo("Rocket")+ammo("Rocket Pod");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Boom 50" | SelectedWeapon = "Boom 25" ? "■" : ""}BOM{ammo("Boom 50")+ammo("Boom 25");00}
CM{Flare*2;000}

{Ledl=1?"":""}
{ammo("Interceptor")>3?"[INT]":""}{ammo("Interceptor")<4&ammo("Inferno")>0?"[INF]":""}
{ammo("Interceptor")>2?"[INT]":""}{ammo("Interceptor")<3&ammo("Inferno")>1?"[INF]":""}
{ammo("Interceptor")>1?"[INT]":""}{ammo("Interceptor")<2&ammo("Inferno")>2?"[INF]":""}
{ammo("Interceptor")>0?"[INT]":""}{ammo("Interceptor")<1&ammo("Inferno")>3?"[INF]":""}
{ammo("Guardian")>3?"[GUA]":""}
{ammo("Guardian")>2?"[GUA]":""}
{ammo("Guardian")>1?"[GUA]":""}
{ammo("Guardian")>0?"[GUA]":""}
{ammo("Cleaver")>0?"[CLE]":""}

{Ledl=0?"":""}
{SelectedWeapon = "Interceptor" ? "■ " : ""}Interceptor {ammo("Interceptor");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Guardian" ? "■ " : ""}Guardian {ammo("Guardian");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Inferno" ? "■ " : ""}Inferno {ammo("Inferno");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Cleaver" ? "■ " : ""}Cleaver {ammo("Cleaver");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Rocket Pod" | SelectedWeapon = "Rocket" ? "■ " : ""}Rocket {ammo("Rocket")+ammo("Rocket Pod");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Boom 50" ? "■ " : ""}Boom 50 {ammo("Boom 50");00}
{SelectedWeapon = "Boom 25" ? "■ " : ""}Boom 25 {ammo("Boom 25");00}
+

Aircraft.Instructions:
PYtoFT demo plane by Whills
YouTube.com/@whillsbp Simpleplanes.com/u/Whills
AG1: Canopy AG2: Airbrake AG3: Tailhook AG4: Lights AG5: Deactivate Weapons AG6: N/A AG7: Jettison Weapons AG8: AOA Limiter
